title: Frontier Position
description: Normalized view of a GeometricFrontierBook position. Mirrors the on-chain positions(positionId) record plus derived live entitlements. Agents should persist at least { book, positionId, owner, side, lower, upper } after every deposit. All token amounts are decimal strings of the underlying uint256 so no precision is lost over JSON.

positionId.description: On-chain position id (uint256), returned by deposit/depositBid.

owner.description: Current owner. Funds settle to the owner; delegates may manage via PermissionRegistry.

side.description: ask = sells token0 above current tick; bid = buys token0 at/below current tick. Mirrors the on-chain isBid flag (ask = false, bid = true).

lower.description: Lower tick of the half-open range [lower, upper). Aligned to tickSpacing.

upper.description: Upper tick (exclusive). Must be > lower and aligned to tickSpacing.

liquidity.description: Resting liquidity per level (uint128). The uniform book rests the same size at every level in range.

depositClock.description: Lifecycle/epoch clock captured at deposit. Enforces epoch isolation / new-deposit freshness (invariants I2, I8): a deposit only earns from fills in its own lifecycle.

claimedUpper.description: High-water mark up to which proceeds have been claimed for this position.

live.description: True while the position still has eligibility. Cancellation sets this false.

claimableNet.description: Net claimable proceeds (after maker fee): token1 for asks, token0 for bids. Derived from claimable()/bidClaimable().

unfilledPrincipal.description: Ask only: unfilled token0 principal still resting. From unfilledPrincipal().

refundable.description: Bid only: refundable token1 for the unfilled portion. From bidRefundable().

claimToken.description: Optional ERC-721 (FrontierPositionNFT) wrapping this position, if tokenized.

depositBlock.description: Block the position was created in (indexer-provided).

strategy.description: Free-form agent metadata: strategy/tag the bot associates with this position.

allOf.$comment: lower must be strictly below upper.

uint.description: Non-negative integer as a decimal string (uint256/uint128 safe over JSON).
